creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

    graphics/epsonscan2: Unbreak build with boost 1.87

    clang does support rvalue references, so remove all use of flag
    "BOOST_NO_CXX11_RVALUE_REFERENCES"

    PR:     284127
